channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Trump flies partway home from Turkey in an old Air Force One
item.description: President Trump flew partway home from a NATO summit on an old Air Force One plane instead of the new Qatari-gifted plane, a surprise swap that came as the U.S. and Iran began trading strikes again.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump flew partway home from a NATO summit on an old Air Force One plane instead of the new Qatari-gifted plane, a surprise swap that came as the U.S. and Iran began trading strikes again.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump wraps NATO summit on a positive note, after meeting Zelenskyy
item.description: President Trump capped a NATO summit in Turkey meeting Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, and saying that the U.S. will give Ukraine a license to make Patriot air defense systems.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump capped a NATO summit in Turkey meeting Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy, and saying that the U.S. will give Ukraine a license to make Patriot air defense systems.

(Image credit: Alex Brandon)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: U.S. launches new airstrikes on Iran and Tehran fires back at Gulf Arab states
item.description: The United States launched new airstrikes against Iran early Thursday, and Tehran responded by targeting Bahrain, Kuwait and Qatar in crossfire that again threatened an interim deal intended to help end the war.
item.content:encoded:
The United States launched new airstrikes against Iran early Thursday, and Tehran responded by targeting Bahrain, Kuwait and Qatar in crossfire that again threatened an interim deal intended to help end the war.

(Image credit: Khalil Hamra)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Graham Platner drops his bid for Senate after facing an allegation of rape
item.description: Platner's campaign to unseat GOP Sen. Susan Collins in Maine was marked by repeated scandals. It came to a crashing halt after the allegation led top Democrats to withdraw their support.
item.content:encoded:
Platner's campaign to unseat GOP Sen. Susan Collins in Maine was marked by repeated scandals. It came to a crashing halt after the allegation led top Democrats to withdraw their support.

(Image credit: CJ Gunther)
item.dc:creator: Barbara Sprunt

item.title: A new proposal for organ donation sparks concern
item.description: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by having their vital organs removed for donation? The ethical concerns are substantial.
item.content:encoded: Should patients who choose euthanasia be able to die by having their vital organs removed for donation? The ethical concerns are substantial.
item.dc:creator: Rob Stein

item.title: Should you sign your kids up for Trump Accounts? Four things to consider
item.description: Families can still benefit even if their children aren't eligible for the free $1,000 contribution from the federal government.
item.content:encoded:
Families can still benefit even if their children aren't eligible for the free $1,000 contribution from the federal government.

(Image credit: TIMOTHY A. CLARY)
item.dc:creator: Stephan Bisaha

item.title: Supreme Court financial disclosures reveal how their books add to their income
item.description: The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives.
item.content:encoded:
The Supreme Court annual financial reports shed light on the justices' gifts, travel and personal lives.

(Image credit: Mario Tama)
item.dc:creator: Nina Totenberg

item.title: New U.S. passports with Trump's image are available. Here's how to get (or avoid) one
item.description: The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.
item.content:encoded:
The passports feature an image of President Trump and are only available in person at the Washington Passport Agency — and only by appointment.

(Image credit: Michele Kelemen)
item.dc:creator: Michele Kelemen

item.title: Appeals court denies Trump's request to halt removal of his name from the Kennedy Center
item.description: The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C., arts institution.
item.content:encoded:
The D.C. circuit appeals court denied all of President Trump's arguments that sought to stop the removal of his name from the Washington, D.C., arts institution.

(Image credit: Alex Wroblewski)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: Tensions with Iran add fresh uncertainty to an already shaky global economy
item.description: Crude oil prices jumped and stock prices fell after President Trump declared an end to the ceasefire with Iran, adding fresh uncertainty to an already shaky outlook for the global economy.
item.content:encoded:
Crude oil prices jumped and stock prices fell after President Trump declared an end to the ceasefire with Iran, adding fresh uncertainty to an already shaky outlook for the global economy.

(Image credit: Michael M. Santiago)
item.dc:creator: Scott Horsley
